title: Autosynch Vocal Isolation Training Weights
author: Wang, Christopher
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Training weights for autosynch. Put `mad.pt` into `src/mad_twinnet/outputs/states` to use. 

 This version trained on non-instrumental tracks of MedleyDB V1. Version trained on V2 coming shortly.
steps_raw:
Training weights for autosynch. Put `mad.pt` into `src/mad_twinnet/outputs/states` to use. 

 This version trained on non-instrumental tracks of MedleyDB V1. Version trained on V2 coming shortly.
